public_launch_ready_posture: Public Launch Ready remains separate from Operational Launch Ready. Public surfaces may stay polished, but specific proof-bound claims still need owner-system evidence or qualification.
hard_constraints_observed: Started with git status --short --branch in Blueprint-WebApp, paperclip, BlueprintCapture, and BlueprintCapturePipeline.
No live sends, payments, providers, rights/legal changes, city launch, hosted-session fulfillment, Notion writes, or Firestore export were performed.
Completion was not inferred from tests alone.
Public Launch Ready and Operational Launch Ready were kept separate.

earliest_hard_stop.blocker: Blueprint does not yet have enough owner-system proof to authorize broad autonomous-org completion. Missing proof spans live KPI sources, claims guard cleanup, Paperclip/Hermes runtime health, Notion Manager durability, hosted-session runtime starts, Stripe payments and payouts, rights/privacy/legal clearance, city-launch sends/replies, Capture real-device release proof, and Pipeline/manual marketplace evidence.
earliest_hard_stop.owner: blueprint-chief-of-staff coordinating analytics-agent, paperclip-runtime-owner, stripe-finance-owner, rights-provenance-agent, city-launch-agent, Capture owner, and Pipeline owner
earliest_hard_stop.retry_condition: Rerun this audit only after the listed owner systems produce fresh proof artifacts and the deterministic gates that currently fail or hold are green without relying on local fixtures alone.
earliest_hard_stop.next_action: Open owner-proof blocker packets or follow-up goals for the blocked live systems; do not broaden production autonomy beyond the current support_triage policy lane.

requirement_matrix_source: BlueprintCapture README, platform/world context, raw contract, and release validators
BlueprintCapturePipeline README, READINESS_MATRIX, same-capture lineage, and launch gate validators
Paperclip AGENTS, GOAL, product/spec docs, and live health surface

worktree_baseline.status_summary: Tracked and untracked WebApp, AutoAgent, Paperclip, KPI, claims, Firestore, docs, and output changes already present; new readiness artifacts were written under output/autonomous-org/readiness/latest.
Many adapter, server, UI, and test changes plus untracked package-lock/test files; no changes were made by this audit.
Stripe, Android XR, public-copy, launch-readiness docs/scripts/tests are dirty or untracked; no changes were made by this audit.
Same-capture lineage, site-reference, modality, orchestrator, retrieval, and readiness changes are dirty or untracked; no changes were made by this audit.

deterministic_gates.evidence: Agents=46, adapters codex_local=10 hermes_local=36, routines=62, active=36, paused=26, missing desiredSkills=0, readiness required-ready=36 blocked-by-env=26.
deterministic_gates.owner_proof_effect: Local inventory passes, but blocked-by-env lanes remain and this does not prove live Paperclip/Hermes runtime health.
Live Paperclip/Hermes runtime health is unproven in this shell.

deterministic_gates.evidence: Scanned 4 fixture runs from server/tests/fixtures/agent-cost-cache-runs.json; total prompt tokens 5100, cached 1180, cost $0.053047; waste signals low_cache_high_prompt=2, no_change_completed=1, duplicate_suppressed=1.
deterministic_gates.owner_proof_effect: Cost reporting works against local fixture fallback, not live Firestore.

deterministic_gates.owner_proof_effect: Hosted starts, sends/replies/calls, CI failures, and revenue/payments remain blocked on live owner sources.

AutoAgent correctly refuses promotion outside the approved lane.

deterministic_gates.owner_proof_effect: Build-time code health passed; this is not operational proof.

deterministic_gates.owner_proof_effect: No-hardware packet validation passes without claiming hardware proof.

Repo-local lineage, site reference, WebApp sync, launch bundle, and privacy tests pass.
Automated repository contracts pass, but live Stripe, payout, identity/KYC, background check, real-device capture, buyer artifact access, and finance-owner evidence remain open.

deterministic_gates.owner_proof_effect: Notion surfaces are visible but do not prove a durable Notion Manager loop.

lanes.owner_proof: Offline eval and negative controls pass; recursive loop holds promotion and avoids live mutation.
lanes.blocker: Selected failure family human_gate_or_reply_durability_blocker is human_policy_gated; waitlist_triage and preview_diagnosis remain shadow-only.
lanes.retry_condition: Promotion gate has required offline, closeout, clean shadow, rollback, and policy evidence for the approved lane.
lanes.next_action: Collect required promotion evidence; do not expand beyond support_triage.

lanes.owner_proof: Control-room inventory and agent-kit validation pass locally.
lanes.blocker: localhost:3100 health check failed with curl exit 7; Notion Manager latest run failed; Paperclip repo is dirty.
lanes.retry_condition: Live Paperclip/Hermes health endpoint responds and current runs/issues show durable watcher ownership.
lanes.next_action: Restore or point at the live Paperclip runtime, then rerun health and issue/watch visibility checks.
lanes.residual_risk: Autonomous dispatch and runtime state cannot be trusted from local inventory alone.

lanes.owner_proof: 4 of 8 KPI rows are sourced from repo-local snapshot contracts.
lanes.blocker: Hosted starts, sends/replies/calls, CI failures, and revenue/payments are Source needed.
lanes.retry_condition: Fresh owner-system evidence exists for hostedSessions, operatingGraph hosted starts, humanReplyEvents/calls, GitHub/Paperclip CI mapping, and Stripe checkout/webhook/payment events.
lanes.next_action: Attach safe read artifacts or live-source snapshots through approved read-only contracts.
lanes.residual_risk: Metrics and Notion KPI rows can drift or overclaim if values are published without source proof.

lanes.blocker: 29 proof-sensitive findings remain across rights-cleared, payment/payout, hosted-session, and provider-execution claims.
lanes.retry_condition: Claims are either backed by owner proof or qualified so they do not invent unsupported facts.
lanes.next_action: Triage findings by current public route vs knowledge/output artifact, then clean or attach proof.
lanes.residual_risk: Public Launch Ready remains allowed, but unsupported Operational Launch Ready claims are not allowed.

lanes.owner_proof: Hosted-session code and graph hotspots exist.
lanes.blocker: No fresh hostedSessions runtime/session evidence and no correlated hosted_review_started operatingGraph event were proven.
lanes.retry_condition: A real hosted session has fresh runtime evidence, entitlement/access proof, and operatingGraph correlation.
lanes.next_action: Run only approved read-only hosted-session proof collection or file a blocker packet.
lanes.residual_risk: Hosted-review copy or KPI starts would be proof drift without runtime evidence.

lanes.lane: Payments, entitlements, payouts, and finance ops
lanes.owner_proof: Repo contract tests for marketplace fulfillment and payout-state transitions are included in the paid-marketplace gate.
lanes.blocker: Live Stripe buyer payment, Stripe Connect payout settlement/readiness, payout exception monitor, finance owner, and buyer artifact access remain manual/live evidence required.
lanes.retry_condition: Live Stripe and finance-owner artifacts are attached and match the WebApp/Capture/Pipeline ledgers.
lanes.next_action: Collect live read-only Stripe/account/payment proof under an explicit action contract; no payments or payouts in this audit.
lanes.residual_risk: Money movement and post-purchase access are not operationally proven.

lanes.lane: Rights, privacy, legal, KYC, and background checks
lanes.owner_proof: Privacy and launch-bundle tests pass in Pipeline, but live/legal owner records were not changed or verified.
lanes.blocker: Rights-cleared claim findings remain; KYC/background provider decisions remain manual decision required.
lanes.retry_condition: Owner-approved rights/privacy clearance records and provider decisions are attached.
lanes.next_action: Prepare blocker packet for legal/finance review; do not auto-resolve legal or KYC decisions.
lanes.residual_risk: Automated tests cannot substitute for counsel/provider decision proof.

lanes.owner_proof: City playbooks, ledgers, and harness code exist.
lanes.blocker: No live send/reply/call owner proof was collected; KPI sends/replies/calls remains Source needed.
lanes.retry_condition: Recipient-backed sends, replies, calls, and city state transitions are proven by owner systems.
lanes.next_action: Run a city-specific approved read-only status audit or execution contract; do not send from this readiness audit.
lanes.residual_risk: A city can be artifact-complete but motion-empty.

lanes.lane: Production mutation registry, canary, and rollback
lanes.owner_proof: Registry remains fail-closed; recursive run attempted no live mutation and held promotion.

lanes.next_action: Keep broad live mutations blocked; only evaluate central-policy-approved low-risk lanes.
lanes.residual_risk: Expanding action types without live runtime proof could create unsupported production authority.

blocked_live_systems: Firestore humanReplyEvents and call ledger evidence
GitHub workflow polling and Paperclip managed CI issue/source mapping snapshots
Stripe checkout, webhook, payment, connected account, and payout evidence
City-launch sends, replies, calls, and response routing evidence
Capture iOS external alpha config and real-device proof
Capture Android external alpha config, Android toolchain proof, and real-device proof
residual_risk: This audit used local tests, repo artifacts, read-only connector visibility, and safe health checks. It intentionally did not perform live writes or external side effects.
Several passing gates are contract or fixture evidence, not owner-system proof.
The worktrees in all four repos are dirty. The dirty state was preserved and may include unrelated user/generated work.
A future audit could flip some lanes only after owner systems provide current proof; no lane should be promoted from these results alone.
